pr.title: 11L Int6 QAT + Per-Dim SmearGate + SWA: 1.1480 BPB (3-seed mean)

output.summary: 11L int6 QAT GPT blends per-dimension SmearGate, SWA, and high-Muon WD to keep weights quantization-friendly while using sliding-window eval.
techniques: Per-dimension SmearGate blending current and previous token embeddings
Int6 QAT with STE, FP16 tied embeddings, and strong Muon weight decay
SWA of late checkpoints to smooth quantized weights
